prompt: A high-angle drone photograph of a lush green park lawn. A paved concrete walkway cuts through the grass, but instead of a smooth, logical curve, the concrete path violently zig-zags in absurd, highly angular, sharp detours. It specifically takes these wild, jagged detours to assure it physically runs exactly over every single scattered, random fallen brown dead leaf on the grass. The result is a chaotic, jagged walkway that connects all the random leaves perfectly but fails completely as a sensible walking path. Realistic, physical outdoor daylight scene, highly plausible, no text, no floating lines, no graphs. Photorealistic, 8k resolution.
metaphor: A concrete walkway violently zig-zags in absurd, sharp detours to perfectly intersect every single randomly scattered fallen leaf, fitting the noise but failing as a general path.
